name: Danilo Table Lamp - 19.5 Inch Height - TBL4469 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Elevate your living space with the Danilo black resin table lamp, measuring 19.5 inches in height. This stylish lamp combines modern design with practical functionality, offering an exquisite touch to any room. Crafted from polyresin, the Danilo lamp showcases a bold black finish that enhances its sleek, contemporary look. 

Its geometric structure pairs effortlessly with the clean lines of the shade, creating an eye-catching focal point in your home decor. Whether placed in the living room or on a bedside table, this lamp provides soft, ambient lighting that adds warmth and sophistication to any setting. 

The Danilo table lamp is perfect for those who appreciate both form and function, making it a versatile addition to your lighting collection. Discover how this elegant piece can transform your space into a haven of style and comfort.
